political.s: Not disclosed. As a private company owned by Apollo Management, Hardee's does not file corporate political contribution reports. Parent company CKE Restaurants' political spending is not publicly tracked.

charity.s: Hardee's engages in charitable giving through Stars for Heroes program benefiting military veterans and families. Since 2011, raised over $9 million across participating restaurants. Local franchisees support various community causes including food banks and children's hospitals.
charity.focus: Military veterans, food assistance, children's health, Special Olympics

environment.s: Limited public environmental data. One franchisee (Boddie-Noell) deployed energy management systems. No comprehensive sustainability reporting or major environmental certifications identified.

labor.s: Employee compensation ranks in bottom 10-15% of similar companies. Average employee salary $20,000-$45,000 annually. Executive compensation averages $229,530 with significant pay disparity. Employees report compensation and benefits dissatisfaction.

dei.s: No public DEI program information available. As a private company, Hardee's does not file HRC CEI reports or disclose diversity metrics.

animals.s: CKE Restaurants has animal welfare commitments including pork sourcing from group housing (80%+), cage-free eggs, antibiotic-reduced poultry, and third-party audits. PETA reports company implemented welfare improvements in 2007.

guns.s: Hardee's is a quick service restaurant chain and does not sell firearms.

privacy.s: Hardee's maintains privacy policies for website, mobile app, and loyalty program. Allows data deletion requests and provides state-specific privacy rights. Collects personal data including location and behavioral tracking for targeted advertising.

execPay.s: Executives average $229,530 annually while crew/entry-level employees average $20,000. Pay ratio estimated 11:1 or higher. Limited CEO compensation transparency due to private status.
